rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.4515 governs professional development policy adoption for school districts. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district and the governing body of an open-enrollment charter school, to the extent applicable, shall annually review the clearinghouse published under Section 21.4514 and adopt a professional development policy
_note: No conflict; the rule text addresses educator professional development and has no connection to homestead exemption amounts.
